source_jobs.title: (Senior) Design Verification Engineer
source_jobs.description:
The future of intelligent microcontrollers is here!

Alif established its first European R&D site to Oulu with the vision to build a center of expertise to complement the staff in the US and India. Our office is in the Technology park and we currently employ more than 30 employees.

Our local team consists of very experienced experts as well as young talents ready to grow in their careers. We have an open, supportive, and relaxed culture and we enjoy coming to the office and collaborating with one another.

We are looking for a motivated and experienced (Senior) Design Verification Engineer to join our Digital IC Design team responsible for Peripheral verification.

What can you expect to focus on as you onboard?

During your first six months, you will focus on building context, forming new relationships, and beginning to build your impact. Your focus will be on becoming familiar with the assigned block or IP and taking ownership of test development. The role includes debugging verification failures as well as understanding and debugging gate-level simulations (GLS). You will work as part of a highly skilled verification team, with opportunities to learn from experienced colleagues around you. The role offers a variety of tasks that can evolve based on your skills and professional development.

It would be great if you could tick some of the boxes below:

  • University degree in Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Embedded Systems or other similar degree
  • Skilled in UVM and System Verilog
  • Programming skills, Proficiency in C
  • Testbench architecture design
  • Knowledge of RTL design fundamentals
  • Clock domain Crossing (CDC)
  • Knowledge of most generic serial protocols
  • Constrained random verification
  • Knowledge of microcontrollers with embedded arm processor cores
  • Knowledge or skills in GLS is plus
  • Team working and c

source_jobs.title: (Senior) Embedded Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Alif established its first European R&D site to Oulu to be a significant center of expertise and employ teams of Software and Digital IC Design experts, to complement the staff in the US and India. We are headquartered in the US, and our office in the Oulu Technology Park employs about 35 employees.

Our local team consists of very experienced experts as well as younger talents ready to take on new challenges in their careers. Our days here often consist of solving very high-level technical challenges and creating new technology, and we can offer you growth opportunities that are unique and rewarding. We have an open, supportive, and relaxed culture. We enjoy coming to the office and collaborating with one another. 

 

As our Finnish site grows, we are looking for a (Senior) Embedded Software Engineer to our Wireless Connectivity Team, working on 15.4, Mesh and BLE development.

Specializing as a wireless engineer, you will work at a variety of levels: All the way from configuring RF to building Zephyr OS applications. The role centers on integrating and maintaining the ROM code split between 2 cores separating controller and host stack for BLE, and 802.15.4 controller and application. You will optimize the low-power scenarios to ensure very long lifetime of embedded devices by reducing battery consumption.

If you are an embedded developer at heart - comfortable with communication protocols and at home where hardware and software meet - this is the role for you to grow into

 

This is a permanent, full-time position for an engineer capable of independent planning, organizing, and executing their own work. The role does not require prior experience in a lead or managerial position but does require a strong sense of ownership and accountability. 

The role will be built around the experience you have, but here’s some requirements that we feel may be beneficial for you to have:

* Degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field

* Skilled in Embedded Software 

* Experience in Low-level Embedded Software

* Proficiency in C

* Proficiency in Arm/Risc-V; familiarity with Verilog/SystemVerilog is a strong plus

* Experience with low-power design techniques

* Experience with wireless protocols and techniques</

source_jobs.title: (Senior) Embedded Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Alif established its first European R&D site to Oulu to be a significant center of expertise and employ teams of Software and Digital IC Design experts, to complement the staff in the US and India. We are headquartered in the US, and our office in the Oulu Technology Park employs over 30 employees.

Our local team consists of very experienced experts as well as younger talents ready to take on new challenges in their careers. Our days here often consist of solving very high-level technical challenges and creating new technology, and we can offer you growth opportunities that are unique and rewarding. We have an open, supportive, and relaxed culture. We enjoy coming to the office and collaborating with one another. 

 

As our Finnish site grows, we are looking for a (Senior) Embedded Software Engineer to our Software Development team to take your first steps toward specializing as a Secure Enclave Engineer in our hardware security domain.

Here’s the roles in more detail:

Specializing as a Secure Enclave Engineer, you will work at the closest level to the hardware — where deep silicon understanding is what matters most. The role centers on low-level embedded firmware, ROM code, and chip lifecycle management, with direct involvement in hardware design and implementation. You will design low-power security subsystems that need to stay on around the clock, work with cryptographic implementations, and contribute to verifying the security of the software stack. If you are an embedded developer at heart — comfortable with minimal abstraction and at home where hardware and software meet — this is the role for you to grow into.

Willingness to grow into a team leadership role is also welcomed

This is a permanent, full-time position for an engineer capable of independent planning, organizing, and executing their own work. The role does not require prior experience in a lead or managerial position but does require a strong sense of ownership and accountability. You will be expected to document your work clearly and report on your activities, progress, and results in a structured and consistent manner. Willingness to grow into a team leadership position is also welcomed, but not mandatory.

 

The role will be built around the experience you have, but here’s some requirements that we feel may be beneficial for you to have:

* Degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field

* Skilled in Embedded Software 

* Experience in Low-level Embedded Software

source_jobs.title: Embedded Software Application Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Alif Semiconductor is revolutionizing the way secure connected AI-enabled embedded solutions are created. We are looking for motivated individuals who want to be involved in a fast-paced environment with cutting-edge technology.

We are looking for self-driven and motivated Application Engineer in Pleasanton, CA to help us promote and support the groundbreaking family of Ensemble Micro Controllers that has received a lot of industry attention.

source_jobs.title: Embedded Software Developer
source_jobs.description:
Alif Semiconductor is revolutionizing the way secure connected AI-enabled embedded solutions are created. We are looking for motivated individuals who want to be involved in a fast-paced environment with cutting-edge technology.

As an Embedded Software Developer for the Secure Processing Element, you will be responsible for developing and releasing to production the security firmware and supporting tools for the Secure Enclave in Alif’s MCU/MPU products. You will work closely with fellow firmware developers, system architects and senior management in order to define and architect the Secure Enclave (SE) firmware, which consists of both system ROM code and runtime firmware running in the SE’s local ram on ARM based cores.  In addition, you will work with others on the development of SW tools that are needed for provisioning the security credentials into the device.  As a Security Firmware developer, you must be very familiar with embedded system security and cryptography, be able to identify system threats and issues and develop embedded firmware using common cryptographic operations to minimize these system threats. You will also work with Alif marketing and lead customers / partners in order integrate market feedback on the security and configuration requirements. Our products are built around advanced Arm cores and bus architectures with a focus on IoT architecture, low power operation and system security. We expect the candidate to have prior experience in an embedded SW development team and to be familiar with ARM MCU’s and MPU’s.

source_jobs.title: Senior Embedded Software Application Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Alif Semiconductor is revolutionizing the way secure connected AI-enabled embedded solutions are created. We are looking for motivated individuals who want to be involved in a fast-paced environment with cutting-edge technology.

We are looking for self-driven and motivated Senior Application Engineer in Pleasanton, CA to help us promote and support the groundbreaking family of Ensemble Micro Controllers that has received a lot of industry attention.
 
Responsibilities:
* Design Embedded Firmware, Application Examples and a Proof-of-Concept solutions.
* Support Alif Semiconductor customers including, but not limited to Zephyr Operating Systems.
* Ensure customer satisfaction by providing outstanding support and guidance.
* Contribute to the development of documentation such as Application Notes, Quick Start Guides and User Manuals.
* Work with the marketing team to validate product requirements and review new product introduction materials.
* Assist in business development activities.
 
Requirements
* Bachelor’s or above degree in Electrical Engineering or Computer Science.
* 8+ years of experience of developing firmware and/or software for embedded products. Experience with IoT edge devices a plus.
* Demonstrated experience in developing device drivers and application software for digital and analog peripherals.
* Proficient in developing software for bare metal and Real Time Operating Systems. Zephyr experience is required.
* Proficient in C and/or C++ programming with best engineering and software development practices.
* Hands-on experience with oscilloscopes, logic analyzers and other standard lab equipment.
* Comfortable working with well-defined and ambiguous requirements.
* Excellent interpersonal communication skills and proactive, can-do attitude.
 
Desired Skills & Experience
* Experience in the following areas is a huge plus:
- ML/AI is a big plus.
- Image pipeline including camera, ISP, encoder, and display.
- Power management for embedded systems.
- Familiarity with BLE, and 802.15.4.

source_jobs.title: Senior Embedded Software Developer(RTOS)
source_jobs.description:
Alif Semiconductor is revolutionizing the way secure connected AI-enabled embedded solutions are created. We are looking for motivated individuals who want to be involved in a fast-paced environment with cutting-edge technology.

The Senior Embedded Software Developer is responsible for Software Development of low level RTOS drivers for MCU peripherals.

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Alif Semiconductor is revolutionizing the way secure connected AI-enabled embedded solutions are created. We are looking for motivated individuals who want to be involved in a fast-paced environment with cutting-edge technology.

We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Senior Product Engineer to join our dynamic semiconductor engineering team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing new product introductions, ensuring product quality, yield optimization, and driving improvements across the manufacturing lifecycle. This role requires strong technical acumen in semiconductor processes and product engineering, as well as excellent problem-solving and cross-functional collaboration skills.

source_jobs.title: Senior/Staff Application Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Alif established its first European R&D site to Oulu to be a significant center of expertise and employ teams of Software and Digital IC Design experts, to complement the staff in the US and India. We are headquartered in the US, and our office in the Oulu Technology Park employs about 35 employees.

 

Our local team consists of very experienced experts as well as younger talents ready to take on new challenges in their careers. Our days here often consist of solving very high-level technical challenges and creating new technology, and we can offer you growth opportunities that are unique and rewarding. We have an open, supportive, and relaxed culture. We enjoy coming to the office and collaborating with one another. 

 

As our staff is growing, we have a role for a (Senior/Staff) Application Engineer in our Application Engineering team.

As an Application Engineer, you will design and develop embedded firmware, application examples, and proof-of-concept solutions showcasing Alif Semiconductors’ product portfolio, including support for customers using ie. Zephyr RTOS and bare metal applications. The role requires hands-on technical engagement, serving as a trusted advisor to our customers, resolving complex application challenges, and ensuring excellent customer satisfaction.

You will also contribute to technical documentation such as Application Notes, Quick Start Guides, and User Manuals, while collaborating with the marketing team to validate product requirements and review new product introduction materials. The role also involves supporting business development activities, bringing technical depth to pre-sales engagements and strategic growth initiatives.

This is a permanent, full-time position for an engineer who is capable of independently planning, organizing, and executing their own work. The role does not require prior experience in a lead or managerial position but does require a strong sense of ownership and accountability. You will be expected to document your work clearly and report on your activities, progress, and results in a structured and consistent manner. 

The role will be built around the experience you have, but here’s some requirements that we feel may be beneficial for you to have:

 

* Bachelor’s or above degree in Electrical Engineering or Computer Science.

* Experience of developing firmware and/or software for embedded products. Experience with IoT edge devices a plus.

* Demonstrated experience in developing device drivers and application software for digital and analog peripherals.

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer - RTOS
source_jobs.description:
About the Role:
 
We are looking for a passionate Embedded Software Engineer to join our team and contribute to the development of drivers and applications for Alif Semiconductor SoC IPs. The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in C programming, ARM architecture, and communication protocols.
 
Why Join Us? 
Alif Semiconductor is revolutionizing the way secure connected AI-enabled embedded solutions are created. We are looking for motivated individuals who want to be involved in a fast-paced environment with cutting-edge technology.
 
·       Cutting-Edge Innovation: Work on microcontrollers that power the future.
·       Global Impact: Our products reach millions worldwide.
·       Collaborative Environment: Be part of a supportive, diverse team.
·       Competitive Compensation: We offer fair and competitive compensation aligned with role expectations.

source_jobs.title: Sr. Digital Implementation Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Alif Semiconductor is revolutionizing the way secure connected AI-enabled embedded solutions are created. We are looking for motivated individuals who want to be involved in a fast-paced environment with cutting-edge technology.

You will be responsible for creating turn-key solutions to support cutting-edge Cellular IoT device. This is a unique opportunity to define a groundbreaking new system with few legacy constraints. As a Sr. Digital Implementation Engineer, you will own the netlist delivery (to Physical Design) of various blocks and chip top level by ensuring the integrity and quality of the RTL database and robust hand-off methodology. This position requires expert knowledge of ASIC synthesis flow (including STA/DFT and IP integration).

notes: Highly technical job postings with a focus on embedded software and digital IC design. No explicit mention of visa sponsorship or clearance requirements.
